transcript:
Agent: Hello, thank you for contacting TeleCom Plus. My name is James. Who am I speaking with?
Customer: Hi James, this is Michael. I'm calling because my bill has been absolutely wrong for the last two months and I'm getting frustrated with the runaround.
Agent: I'm sorry to hear that, Michael. Let me help you with that. Can I get your account number?
Customer: It's 5847293847. And before you put me on hold, I've already talked to three different people about this, and nobody has fixed it yet.
Agent: I understand your frustration, Michael. Let me take a look at your account and see what's going on. I can see here that you were overcharged $85 on your January bill and $92 on your December bill. That's definitely not right.
Customer: Yes! That's exactly it. And when I called last week, they said they would credit me back, but I still haven't seen the refund.
Agent: You have every right to be upset. I can see you were promised a credit, and I'm sorry that wasn't processed. Let me fix this right now for you.
Customer: Thank you. How long will this take?
Agent: I'm processing the refund now. However, I'm also noticing that your plan might not be the best fit for your usage. You're being charged overages that you shouldn't be. Have you considered upgrading to our Unlimited Plus plan?
Customer: Are you seriously trying to sell me something right now? I just want my refund!
Agent: I apologize if that came across wrong, Michael. I was just trying to help you save money in the future. Let me focus on your immediate issue first.
Customer: Please do. When will I get my refund?
Agent: The refund I'm processing should appear in your account within 2-3 business days. However, I need to escalate the plan billing issue because it requires a supervisor review.
Customer: Escalate it? Why can't you just fix it yourself?
Agent: The plan changes require supervisor approval to ensure we're giving you the best rate. A supervisor will contact you within 24 hours with options. Is that acceptable?
Customer: It's not ideal, but I guess I don't have a choice. Can you at least guarantee I won't be overcharged again?
Agent: I can guarantee that once we adjust your plan, you won't be charged overages. The supervisor will make sure this is handled correctly.
Customer: Alright. This took way longer than it should have. I hope this actually gets resolved this time.
Agent: I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this has caused you. Is there anything else I can help you with?
Customer: No, that's it.
Agent: Thank you for your patience, Michael. Have a good day.
